{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Skysworn Soulsmiths
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn Soulsmiths]] can add additional options to the armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
